text:
More information:

I am using GNOME 3 but I did try Blender on Fluxbox and got the same error.

pkg_libchk -qo shows:

java/java3d                                                                    
editors/libreoffice

Above "problems" I have years.
And I have installed FreeBSD 10.1 on iMac 11,1. The graphics card is ATI Radeon HD 4850 and it works without problems.

Thank you.
